intent.summary: Turn a rough project update into a concise Grok/X-ready reply about SMP.
intent.success_condition: The response explains the practical value of SMP without sounding like hype.

context.current_stage: local web composer plus bridge tools

constraints.length: short enough for an X reply

trajectory.preserve: SMP as a non-invasive semantic bandwidth layer between humans and AI

desired_output.format: short Grok/X-ready reply with GitHub link

memory_hooks.core_line: The next bottleneck may be semantic bandwidth between humans and AI.
